name: projects/10033276352334490527/screens/32a5b926d6b443e6b1a6cbac5ceb7d65
title: A wide, non-repeating panoramic pixel art illustration of a baseball stadium interior at night. Retro 16-bit SNES style. Shows the field, stands with a crowd, floodlights, and a scoreboard. High detail, vibrant colors (green field, brown dirt, dark blue night sky), clean lines. No real photographic elements. Professional game art quality.
